name: io.github.dongdongbh/mindwtr
title: Mindwtr
description: Task and project automation for local Mindwtr data, with read-only self-hosted Cloud access.

environmentVariables.name: MINDWTR_DB_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Optional path to the local Mindwtr SQLite database.

environmentVariables.name: MINDWTR_MCP_CLOUD_URL
environmentVariables.description: Optional self-hosted Mindwtr Cloud base URL for read-only Cloud mode.

environmentVariables.name: MINDWTR_MCP_CLOUD_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Bearer token for read-only self-hosted Mindwtr Cloud mode.
